name: 微分方程与级数（HL）
subject: math
curriculum_points:
SL 1.7
Content Guidance, clarification and syllabus links
Laws of exponents with rational exponents. 1
am =ma, if m is even this refers to the positive root.
For example: 164 =8.
Laws of logarithms. y=ax ⇔x=loga y; loga a = 1, loga1 = 0,
loga xy=loga x+loga y a, y ∈ ℕ, x ∈ ℤ
x Link to: introduction to logarithms (SL1.5)
logay =loga x−loga y

SL 1.7
Content Guidance, clarification and syllabus links

4 ln4
loga x= l l o o g g b b a x , for a, b, x>0 Examples: log 125= log 5 125 (= 3 )
25 log 25 2
Solving exponential equations, including using x
Examples: ( 1 ) =9 x+1, 2 x−1=10.
logarithms. 3

(SL2.9).
